overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player moves along a rooftop overlooking a busy street, enters a building through maintenance corridors, navigates an apartment hallway, and enters Judy's apartment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop overlooking cyberpunk city intersection

events.description: multiple vehicles visible moving through the wet intersection below

agents.ego_description: observing the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape from a rainy rooftop, watching traffic flow below

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
raised highway structure running through the city center
single palm tree on the rooftop edge silhouetted against city lights
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting neon lights
illuminated traffic signals controlling the flow below

segments.scene_description: Standing on a rain-soaked rooftop overlooking a bustling cyberpunk intersection. Neon skyscrapers tower in the distance while vehicles navigate the wet streets below. The camera moves slowly along the rooftop edge, taking in the atmospheric cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop patio with neon signage

events.description: entering covered rooftop area with glowing 'BROKEN' neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop toward a covered seating area with furniture

entered.detail: cyan neon sign spelling 'BROKEN' mounted on the wall
weathered couch and table setup under the roof overhang
perforated metal screen wall dividing the space

segments.scene_description: Moving into a partially covered section of the rooftop featuring a glowing 'BROKEN' neon sign and weathered furniture. The space is sheltered from the rain, with metal grate walls and a view of the neon towers now visible to the left.

events.description: descending metal staircase leading down from rooftop level
entering interior building hallway from exterior rooftop structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow rooftop corridors and descending stairs into the apartment building

entered.detail: perforated metal walkway flooring with gaps showing levels below
exposed utility pipes running along the corridor walls
metal safety railing along the descending staircase
dim green exit sign illuminating the corridor end

segments.scene_description: Navigating through narrow maintenance corridors with metal grate flooring and exposed piping. The environment shifts from open rooftop to enclosed industrial space as the camera descends a stairwell into the building interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment building hallway with jellyfish mural

events.description: approaching Judy's apartment door with illuminated keypad lock

agents.ego_description: walking down the teal-lit hallway toward the apartment entrance

entered.detail: blue wall painted with white and red jellyfish silhouettes
dark metal door with 'Judy's Apartment' label
electronic access panel with green indicator light

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow apartment hallway with distinctive jellyfish murals on the walls. The camera approaches a dark metal door labeled as Judy's apartment, featuring an electronic keypad lock with a glowing green light.

scene_state.functional_zone: Judy Alvarez's apartment interior with bathroom and living area

events.description: entering Judy's apartment through the unlocked door
moving from bathroom area into main living space with bar and aquarium

agents.ego_description: entering the apartment, briefly inspecting the bathroom, then moving into the main living area with the bar and aquarium

entered.detail: white front-loading washer in the bathroom corner
white rectangular tub against the tiled wall
curved counter with yellow neon trim and stools
large illuminated fish tank with blue lighting
pink glowing light fixture on the far wall

segments.scene_description: Inside Judy's apartment, the space opens into a bathroom with white fixtures before transitioning to a moody living area. The main room features a bar with yellow neon lighting, a large illuminated aquarium, and pink neon accents creating a cozy cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-drenched rooftop overlooking a neon metropolis into the intimate, moody interior of a private apartment. It begins at the edge of a soaked roof, gazing out at towering skyscrapers and bustling wet streets before moving toward a sheltered area marked by a glowing BROKEN neon sign and weathered furniture. The perspective then shifts from the open air into the enclosed industrial depths of the building, navigating narrow maintenance corridors and descending a stairwell through exposed piping. As the camera emerges from the industrial space, it glides through a narrow apartment hallway adorned with jellyfish murals toward a dark metal door with a glowing green keypad. Finally, the scene opens into a bathroom before expanding into a cozy living area defined by a yellow neon bar, a large illuminated aquarium, and soft pink accents.
